 \

command_results.label: prepare_release
command_results.stdout:
.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/h2kg-full.owl annotate -V http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/releases/2026-04-09/h2kg-full.owl --annotation owl:versionInfo 2026-04-09 --output h2kg-full.owl.tmp.owl && mv h2kg-full.owl.tmp.owl h2kg-full.owl
robot --catalog catalog-v001.xml annotate --input h2kg-full.owl --ontology-iri http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/h2kg-full.json annotate -V http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/releases/2026-04-09/h2kg-full.json --annotation owl:versionInfo 2026-04-09 \
	convert --check false -f json -o h2kg-full.json.tmp.json &&\
	mv h2kg-full.json.tmp.json h2kg-full.json
robot --catalog catalog-v001.xml annotate --input h2kg-full.owl --ontology-iri http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/h2kg-full.ttl annotate -V http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/releases/2026-04-09/h2kg-full.ttl --annotation owl:versionInfo 2026-04-09 \
	convert --check false -f ttl -o h2kg-full.ttl.tmp.ttl && mv h2kg-full.ttl.tmp.ttl h2kg-full.ttl
robot --catalog catalog-v001.xml query -f csv -i tmp/merged-h2kg-edit.ofn --query ../sparql/h2kg_terms.sparql tmp/ontologyterms.txt
robot --catalog catalog-v001.xml query -f csv -i tmp/merged-h2kg-edit.ofn --query ../sparql/simple-seed.sparql tmp/simple_seed.txt.tmp &&\
cat tmp/simple_seed.txt.tmp tmp/ontologyterms.txt | sort | uniq >  tmp/simple_seed.txt &&\
echo "http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#SubsetProperty" >> tmp/simple_seed.txt &&\
echo "http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#SynonymTypeProperty" >> tmp/simple_seed.txt
robot --catalog catalog-v001.xml merge --input tmp/h2kg-preprocess.owl  \
	reason --reasoner ELK --equivalent-classes-allowed asserted-only --exclude-tautologies structural --annotate-inferred-axioms false \
	relax --include-subclass-of true \
	remove --axioms equivalent \
	filter --term-file tmp/simple_seed.txt --select "annotations ontology anonymous self" --trim true --signature true \
	reduce -r ELK --include-subproperties true \
	odk:normalize --base-iri http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo --subset-decls true --synonym-decls true \
	repair --merge-axiom-annotations true \
	 annotate --ontology-iri http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/h2kg-simple.owl annotate -V http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/releases/2026-04-09/h2kg-simple.owl --annotation owl:versionInfo 2026-04-09 --output h2kg-simple.owl.tmp.owl && mv h2kg-simple.owl.tmp.owl h2kg-simple.owl
robot --catalog catalog-v001.xml annotate --input h2kg-simple.owl --ontology-iri http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/h2kg-simple.json annotate -V http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/releases/2026-04-09/h2kg-simple.json --annotation owl:versionInfo 2026-04-09 \
	convert --check false -f json -o h2kg-simple.json.tmp.json &&\
	mv h2kg-simple.json.tmp.json h2kg-simple.json
robot --catalog catalog-v001.xml annotate --input h2kg-simple.owl --ontology-iri http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/h2kg-simple.ttl annotate -V http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/h2kg/releases/2026-04-09/h2kg-simple.ttl --annotation owl:versionInfo 2026-04-09 \
	convert --check false -f ttl -o h2kg-simple.ttl.tmp.ttl && mv h2kg-simple.ttl.tmp.ttl h2kg-simple.ttl
